/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/formula_widget_tests.dir/formula_widget_tests_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/formula_widget_tests.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/formula_widget_tests.dir/formula_widget_test.cpp.o -o formula_widget_tests -F/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib ../mfl/src/libmfl.a /opt/homebrew/lib/QtWidgets.framework/Versions/A/QtWidgets /opt/homebrew/lib/QtTest.framework/Versions/A/QtTest /opt/homebrew/lib/QtGui.framework/Versions/A/QtGui -framework OpenGL -framework ImageIO -framework Metal /opt/homebrew/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers -framework Security -framework AppKit -framework ApplicationServices -framework Foundation -framework IOKit
